idea-plugin.name: JsonPathEditor
idea-plugin.description:
JsonPath Live Editor

The ultimate real-time JSONPath playground for developers.

🚀 Core Features:

  • Live Evaluation: Results update instantly as you type in the dedicated tool window.
  • Smart Auto-Quotes: Automatically handles JSON syntax for you.
  • Intelligent Formatting: Preserves your file's indentation during live edits.
  • Universal Compatibility: Supports .json, .jsonc, and .json5 files.

💎 Freemium Benefits:

Feature Free PRO
Interactive Tool Window ✅ ✅
Manual Search ✅ ✅
Right-Click Context Action ❌ ✅
Instant Path Generation ❌ ✅

The Pro version offers the Search by Value context menu, allowing you to generate complex paths in a single click, saving you minutes of manual typing every day.

📖 How to use:

  1. Open a JSON file.
  2. Open the JsonPath Editor tool window on the right.
  3. Start typing your query (e.g., $.store.book[*].author).

action.description: Recherche tous les chemins ayant cette valeur
